error_signature: Please provide the correct Unique ID.
title: Invalid Unique ID error in HTTP Request node
symptom: When trying to use a Unique ID in the HTTP Request node, n8n returns an error stating 'Please provide the correct Unique ID.'
not_this_if: Unique ID is correctly formatted and accepted
root_cause: The error occurs when the Unique ID provided in the header is either incorrect or contains leading/trailing spaces. This can also happen if the Unique ID is not generated correctly due to issues with the signup process.
fix_steps: Check the Unique ID for leading or trailing spaces and remove them.
If the issue persists, sign up again with a different email to generate a new Unique ID.
Configure the HTTP Request node with the new Unique ID as the header value.
agent_instruction: Ensure the Unique ID has no spaces and try signing up again for a new ID if the error continues.
